app.title: Lilt GUI
app.description: Modern GUI for Lilt - Lightweight Intelligent Lossless Transcoder

output.title: Output
output.empty: No output yet. Start transcoding to see progress.

tooltips.lilt_path: Path to the Lilt binary executable
tooltips.sox_path: Path to SoX (Sound eXchange) binary for audio processing
tooltips.sox_ng_path: Path to SoX-NG binary (alternative to SoX)
tooltips.ffmpeg_path: Path to FFmpeg binary for ALAC support and metadata preservation
tooltips.ffprobe_path: Path to FFprobe binary for audio file analysis
tooltips.use_docker: Use Docker to run audio processing tools instead of local installation
tooltips.docker_image: Docker image containing SoX and FFmpeg tools
tooltips.source_dir: Directory containing audio files to be processed
tooltips.target_dir: Directory where processed audio files will be saved
tooltips.enforce_output_format: Convert all audio files to the specified format
tooltips.no_preserve_metadata: Skip copying metadata and cover art from original files
tooltips.copy_images: Copy JPG and PNG image files along with audio files
tooltips.identify: Automatically find the binary in your system PATH

about.title: About Lilt GUI
about.description: Lilt GUI is a modern desktop application that provides a user-friendly interface for the Lilt command-line tool. Lilt is a lightweight intelligent lossless transcoder that converts Hi-Res FLAC and ALAC files to 16-bit formats.

lilt.title: About Lilt
lilt.description: Lilt is a cross-platform command-line tool written in Go that handles audio transcoding with intelligent quality optimization. It supports FLAC, ALAC, and MP3 formats with various conversion options.

usage.title: How to Use
steps: 1. Configure binary paths or enable Docker mode
2. Select source directory containing audio files
3. Choose target directory for processed files
